_comment: My First Desk -- a balanced starter config with 4 agents.
name: My First Desk
description: A beginner-friendly trading desk that pairs momentum and mean-reversion strategies under strict risk management, with a quant analyst feeding signals to both.

_agent_notes.risk-manager: Hired first -- gatekeeps every trade proposal. No order fires without approval.
_agent_notes.momentum-trader: Rides trends using moving-average crossovers and ADX filters.
_agent_notes.mean-reversion-trader: Fades overextended moves using Bollinger Bands and RSI.
_agent_notes.quant-analyst: Runs statistical screens and feeds scored signals to the two traders.

risk_parameters._comment: Conservative limits suitable for a first desk.
